title: PLAYSTATION PS5 DualSense Wireless Controller with USB Type-C Cable - Midnight Black
subtitle: PLAYSTATION PS5 DualSense Wireless
overview: Bring your PC games to life with the PS5 DualSense wireless controller. The Haptic feedback lets you feel every hit, knock and tiny detail like it's happening right in your hands. Adaptive triggers add that extra bit of tension, changing with whatever's going on in the game. And with quick Bluetooth pairing or USB Type-C, you can hop between your PC, console or phone without breaking your flow.  Good to know  - Steam support gets you into 10,000+ PC games straight away - Its multi-device memory keeps four Bluetooth connections ready to switch - Remote Play streams your PS5 or PS4 games straight to your PC - Its textured controls improve grip and precision during fast in-game moments - The rechargeable battery gives you hours of wireless gameplay - Firmware updates install directly through the PlayStation Accessories PC app

subtitle: HP Smart Tank 7006
overview: Say goodbye to cartridges and save money on ink with this HP Smart Tank Inkjet Printer. The included ink bottles can print up to 12,000 black and white and 8,000 pages of colour. Refilling the ink is easy thanks to the spill-free resealable bottles - so no inky fingers.   Good to know  - Automatic double-sided printing means less paper used and more money, time and trees saved - Automatic ink sensor constantly monitors levels, letting you know in advance when ink is low so there are no nasty surprises - Print, scan and copy straight from your phone with the HP Smart App - The WiFi connection and Apple AirPrint let you print from anywhere

subtitle: FITBIT Charge 6 Fitness
overview: Get your fitness journey back on track with the Fitbit Charge 6. It has a whopping 7 days of battery life so you can track an entire weeks' worth of data without running out of juice. Even when you're asleep, your Fitbit is monitoring your heart rate, blood oxygen, skin temperature and more, for a well-rounded overview of your health. With a daily sleep score, you'll be able to tell how soundly your slept which means you can improve your health from all angles. title: JLAB Go Party Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Black
subtitle: JLAB Go Party Portable
overview: Turn up the fun with this JLab Go Party speaker. This compact 10 W speaker's dual drivers and passive woofers give you clear highs and punchy bass. With the JLab app, you can choose from Signature, Balance or Bass Boost EQ presets and set the RGB party lights to match your mood. The batterylasts up to 16 hours (or around 8 with lights), so the music keeps going well into the night. And when you want to go big, LabSync lets you link up to 100 speakers, so every room joins in on the party.  Good to know  - Stereo pairing lets you split sound left and right for an immersive feel - IP56 water resistance means a bit of rain won't stop the music - The loop handle makes the speaker easy to carry wherever you go
